result.summary: Buser exposes an OAuth-protected remote MCP server at https://mcp.buser.com.br/mcp; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on buser.com.br.
result.description: Buser is a Brazilian travel platform for intercity bus trips using collaborative chartering. Its public site also publishes AI-readable route content and destination pages.

buser_mcp_oauth_client.label: Buser MCP OAuth client
buser_mcp_oauth_client.setup: Use an MCP client that supports OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code with PKCE against Buser's authorization server discovered at [oauth-authorization-server](https://mcp.buser.com.br/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server). Register or obtain a client with Buser so your MCP client can start authorization at `https://mcp.buser.com.br/authorize` and exchange the code at `https://mcp.buser.com.br/token`. The metadata shows token endpoint auth methods `client_secret_post` and `client_secret_basic`, plus PKCE `S256`.
